unique_index.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_card_prints_identity_v2_standard_sets ON public.card_prints USING btree (set_id, number_plain, COALESCE(printed_identity_modifier, ''::text), COALESCE(variant_key, ''::text)) WHERE ((set_id IS NOT NULL) AND (number_plain IS NOT NULL) AND (set_identity_model = 'standard'::text))
